description: Professional wall plugs and screws for commercial or occasional home use Countersunk screw fasteners with raw plugs 5mm x 40mm screws + wall plugs This listing is for a pack of 40 screws and wall plugs (20 x screws and 20 x plugs) Manufactured from steel for maximum strength and durability Brass plated for rust and corrosion resistance Perfect for a wide range of fixing needs in softwood, hardwood, MDF, timber, concrete, brick etc.. Double countersunk reduces the likelihood of head shear and assists completion of countersinking Can be used for precision applications like the fastening of chipboards of varying densities Pozi headed screws Suitable for concrete, brick and wood SPECIFICATIONS Screws and wall plugs Fully threaded screws 5mm x 40mm screw size Pozi headed screws Manufactured from steel Finish – brass coating screws / plastic wall plugs Coarse thread Suitable for – concrete, brick and wood 20 x wall plugs 20 x 40mm screws
